name: Jonathan Molina
headline: AE @ Deel
text:
Happy 1st year! Love your content! 

« Becoming a student of outbound again » relate a lot to that! Since posting here, I’ve also been learning a lot!
llm_reasoning: AE-level role (not senior), cheerleading comment with no forcing moment — just celebrating someone else's anniversary.

name: Emeric Ernoult
headline: Co-founder & CEO of Agorapulse // Author: Chief Accountability Officer Saas // AI Student // Social Media // Sailor // Kitesurfing addict
text: These are great learnings, and they make sense. I’m happy this is working out for you.
llm_reasoning: Senior title (Co-founder & CEO) but comment is pure cheerleading with no personal forcing moment or vulnerability described.

name: Matei C.
headline: Sales capability gaps cost you quota | Hire me as VP of Sales, Operating Partner
text: Interesting. Also 1 year of XP as an independent revenue operating partner and I see lots of similar lessons and patterns 👨‍🍳 Elric Legloire
llm_reasoning: 1 year into going independent as a revenue operating partner (VP Sales-level positioning), reflecting on patterns and lessons — classic independent transition forcing moment with senior means.

name: Elijah Awoke
headline: I cold call for a living | I build lists & cold call that list on a performance basis to make you more revenue | Watch my Loom video in my feature section and then DM me to run a paid 30 day pilot
text: Congrats man!! I remember 2.5 years ago when I wanted to get better as a cold caller, your podcast came on YT. I binge watched all episodes. That was a great learning channel for me!
llm_reasoning: Cold caller role with no seniority, speaking retrospectively about learning 2.5 years ago — no current forcing moment.

name: Troy Johnson
headline: Coaching elite-level SDRs | SDR Enablement @JumpCloud | Outbound Coach + Career Coach
text:
Love all of these. Awesome to see all the growth you’ve had over the past year my friend. 

“Your outbound problem isn't a people problem. It's a productivity problem disguised as an outdated systems problem.”

👆THIS is my favorite. 

Even the best talent can produce mediocre results in a bad system
llm_reasoning: Headline explicitly includes 'Outbound Coach + Career Coach' — they ARE a coach, automatic reject regardless of comment quality.

name: Vlad Talevski
headline: B2B SaaS SDR | Driving qualified pipeline through problem-led discovery so AEs close deals, not chase unqualified leads
text:
That last line hit hard, outbound isn’t broken, it’s outdated.

In my experience, most teams confuse scaling with solving. Fixing process before people is what actually compounds results.

Appreciate this post, lots of truth here.
llm_reasoning: SDR-level role (not senior), generic agreement comment with no personal situation or forcing moment described.

name: Marius André
headline: Principal | Normandin Beaudry
text:
Great content with precision / détailled approach and real exemple. One of the best was the one around Q4 planning once you get in the weeds with numbers and spreadsheets. 

Curious about what help you delivering the best value to your client ? Finding the right fit / ICP ? Having a comprehensive fo
llm_reasoning: Principal at a consulting firm (senior title with means) asking substantive questions about service delivery and diagnostics — suggests active professional curiosity, though no explicit personal forcing moment is described.
